title: We need an easy way to exclude zeros or nulls from widgets
excerpt: It would be great if there was an easy way to remove zeros or nulls from widgets/dashboards, etc. Zeros and nulls can skew results when they should just be skipped.

posts.author: kelliem (Kellie M)
posts.cookedHtml: It would be great if there was an easy way to remove zeros or nulls from widgets/dashboards, etc. Zeros and nulls can skew results when they should just be skipped.
